title: oldenlandia rubra
intro: Oldenlandia rubra, also known as Red Stemmed Oldenlandia, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Oldenlandia rubra include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and exhibit hepatoprotective effects, making it a useful remedy for treating various health conditions. Oldenlandia rubra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its numerous health benefits.
